title: stelis nephropetala
intro: Stelis nephropetala is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Stelis nephropetala is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
